text_blocks.text: New York City is additionally a center for the
advertising, music, newspaper, digital media, and
publishing industries and is also the largest media
market in North America. Some of the city's media
conglomerates and institutions include Time Warner, the
Thomson Reuters Corporation, the Associated Press,
Bloomberg L.P., the News Corporation, The New
York Times Company, NBCUniversal, the Hearst
Corporation, AOL, and Viacom. Seven of the world's
top eight global advertising agency networks have
their headquarters in New York. Two of the top three
record labels' headquarters are in New York: Sony
Music Entertainment and Warner Music Group.
Universal Music Group also has offices in New
York. New media enterprises are contributing an
increasingly important component to the city's central
